authToken.label: Auth Token
authToken.help: Bearer token for Covalence server (or use ${COVALENCE_AUTH_TOKEN})

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant memories into context before agent runs

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Extract insights from conversations as memories

recallMaxResults.label: Recall Max Results
recallMaxResults.help: Maximum memories to inject on auto-recall (default: 5)

sessionIngestion.label: Session Ingestion
sessionIngestion.help: Capture conversations as Covalence sources for compilation into knowledge articles

staleSessionMinutes.label: Stale Session Threshold
staleSessionMinutes.help: Minutes of inactivity before a session is considered stale (default: 30)

autoCompileOnFlush.label: Auto-Compile on Flush
autoCompileOnFlush.help: Automatically trigger queue processing when flushing sessions (default: true)

includeSystemMessages.label: Include System Messages
includeSystemMessages.help: Include system messages in session transcripts (default: true)

inferenceEnabled.label: Inference Proxy
inferenceEnabled.help: Expose OpenAI-compatible /covalence/v1/chat/completions and /embeddings endpoints for Covalence engine

inferenceToken.label: Inference Token
inferenceToken.help: Bearer token required to call the inference proxy endpoints (leave empty to disable auth)

inferenceModel.label: Inference Model
inferenceModel.help: Provider/model ID for chat completions (e.g. github-copilot/gpt-4.1-mini)

chatModel.label: Chat Model Default
chatModel.help: Default model ID for chat completions when not specified in request (default: gpt-4.1-mini)

embeddingModel.label: Embedding Model
embeddingModel.help: Default model ID for embeddings requests (default: text-embedding-3-small)
